summary: Engineering / Machinery Breakdown insurance covering sudden and unforeseen physical damage to machinery, plant, and equipment in operation. Includes boiler and pressure vessel inspection services. FCA-regulated product with statutory inspection obligations under PSSR 2000.

schemaEntities.description: Machinery item entity. Custom: PlantItemRef, MachineType, ManufacturerCode, YearOfManufacture, InsuredValue, InspectionScheme, LastInspectionDate, NextInspectionDate, PSSR2000_Applicable.

83 rules: PSSR 2000 written scheme inspection requirement, boiler inspection currency, machinery age-based deductible application, inspection scheme provider validation, electronic equipment age limits.

relationships.note: Coverage terms driven by machine type and inspection status
PSSR 2000 inspection rules are statutory compliance hard stops

migrationIssues.detail: Pressure Systems Safety Regulations 2000 written scheme inspection tracking. GW Cloud has no native PSSR compliance module -- external inspection tracking system integration required.
Approved inspection scheme provider validation (Lloyd's Register, Bureau Veritas, etc.). External provider register lookup required -- no GW Cloud native integration.
Multi-item machinery schedule with individual limits and deductibles. GW Cloud schedule entity supports -- configuration migration work required.
Machine age-based deductible schedule. GW Cloud rating tables support age modifiers -- straightforward migration.

cloudMapping.action: PSSR 2000 compliance flag requires custom extension and inspection tracking integration
Inspection scheme provider validation -- external register API integration
Direct mapping -- GW Cloud native field
